design: The abdomens of 6~8 bees for each replicate were pooled as a sample for the total RNA extraction using Trizol reagent (Invitrogen, Carlsbad, USA). After quantification and quality control, a total of 3 g of total RNA was prepared to purify the Poly (A) mRNA using poly-T oligo-attached magnetic beads (Invitrogen). The mRNA was broken down into small pieces by divalent cations under elevated temperature, which were used to generate the sequencing library using a mRNA-Seq sample preparation kit (Illumina, San Diego, USA) following the manufacturers instruction, and the average insert size of the paired-end libraries ranged from 250 bp to 350 bp. The library was sequenced on Illumina Novaseq 6000 platform (Illumina), and 150 bp paired-end reads were generated.
